name: NudgeMaster behavioural ad engine
rationale: Uses subliminal/manipulative techniques that materially distort behaviour beyond awareness causing harm -> Art. 5(1)(a) prohibited.

answers.sys_description: Optimises ad timing and audio cues below the threshold of conscious perception to push impulse purchases.
answers.intended_purpose: Maximise conversions by covertly steering user behaviour.

name: ElderHelper subscription upseller
rationale: Exploits vulnerabilities due to age/cognitive decline to distort behaviour with harm -> Art. 5(1)(b) prohibited.

answers.sys_description: Targets elderly users with confusing prompts that exploit reduced digital literacy to lock them into costly subscriptions.
answers.intended_purpose: Increase recurring revenue from elderly customers.

name: CivicTrust national citizen score
rationale: General-purpose social scoring leading to detrimental treatment in unrelated contexts -> Art. 5(1)(c) prohibited.

answers.sys_description: Aggregates unrelated social behaviour into a single trust score used to gate access to housing and loans.
answers.intended_purpose: Differentiate citizen access to services by behaviour score.

name: PreCrime offender risk profiler
rationale: Predicts criminal behaviour based solely on profiling/personality traits -> Art. 5(1)(d) prohibited.

answers.sys_description: Estimates the probability that an individual will commit a crime using only personality traits and profiling, with no objective verifiable facts.
answers.intended_purpose: Flag individuals to police before any offence occurs.

name: FaceVault scraping crawler
rationale: Untargeted scraping of facial images from internet/CCTV to build a recognition database -> Art. 5(1)(e) prohibited.

answers.sys_description: Crawls the public web and CCTV feeds to harvest facial images and expand a facial-recognition database.
answers.intended_purpose: Build a large searchable facial-recognition index.

name: MoodMeter workplace emotion monitor
rationale: Emotion recognition of employees in the workplace (not medical/safety) -> Art. 5(1)(f) prohibited.

answers.sys_description: Uses webcam analysis to infer employee emotions during work and reports engagement levels to managers.
answers.intended_purpose: Track staff emotional engagement at their desks.

name: BioSort sensitive-attribute classifier
rationale: Biometric categorisation inferring sensitive attributes (religion, sexual orientation) -> Art. 5(1)(g) prohibited.

answers.sys_description: Analyses face and voice biometrics to infer a person's religion, political opinion and sexual orientation.
answers.intended_purpose: Categorise individuals by inferred sensitive attributes.

name: StreetWatch live face ID for police
rationale: Real-time remote biometric identification in public spaces for law enforcement -> Art. 5(1)(h) prohibited.

answers.sys_name: StreetWatch live face ID for police
answers.sys_description: Performs real-time remote biometric identification of people in public squares for general policing without a listed exception.
answers.intended_purpose: Continuously identify passers-by for law enforcement.

name: GridGuard substation safety controller
rationale: Safety component of an Annex I regulated product requiring third-party conformity assessment -> Art. 6(1) high-risk.

answers.sys_description: An ML safety component embedded in industrial machinery that trips breakers to prevent overload faults.
answers.intended_purpose: Act as the safety controller of regulated electrical machinery.

name: ExamProctor learning assessment
rationale: Used in education to evaluate learning outcomes (Annex III-3) -> Art. 6(2) high-risk.

answers.sys_description: Scores student exam answers and determines progression to the next education level.
answers.intended_purpose: Evaluate learning outcomes and assign grades.

name: CreditDecide loan scorer
rationale: Creditworthiness/credit scoring is an essential service (Annex III-5) -> Art. 6(2) high-risk.

answers.sys_description: Assesses creditworthiness of consumer loan applicants and recommends approve/deny.
answers.intended_purpose: Score applicants for consumer credit decisions.

name: BorderCheck visa risk triage
rationale: Risk assessment for visa/asylum applications (Annex III-7) -> Art. 6(2) high-risk.

answers.sys_description: Assigns a risk score to visa and asylum applications to prioritise case handling.
answers.intended_purpose: Triage migration applications by estimated risk.

name: RouteSentry traffic safety component
rationale: Safety component for road-traffic management is critical infrastructure (Annex III-2) -> Art. 6(2) high-risk.

answers.sys_description: Manages traffic-signal timing as a safety component of the road-traffic control system.
answers.intended_purpose: Control traffic flow safely at city intersections.

name: ShiftPlanner internal vacancy ranker (preparatory only)
rationale: Annex III-4 employment AND a narrow preparatory task without profiling: Art. 6(3) derogation may apply but is NOT yet documented, so it stays high-risk in this tool (correct: high until Art. 6(4) assessment is recorded).

answers.sys_description: Performs a narrow preparatory de-duplication and formatting step on internal job postings before a human recruiter ranks candidates.
answers.intended_purpose: Pre-format vacancy data for human review only.

name: PromoPicker employment profiler (minor-task claim + profiling)
rationale: Annex III-4 employment with profiling of natural persons: Art. 6(3) derogation is never available where profiling occurs -> always high-risk.

answers.sys_description: Profiles employees on behaviour and traits to recommend promotions, while claiming to be only a preparatory step.
answers.intended_purpose: Recommend promotion candidates from staff profiles.

name: JusticeAssist case-law summariser
rationale: Assists a judicial authority in interpreting facts and law (Annex III-8) -> Art. 6(2) high-risk.

answers.sys_description: Helps judges research and interpret facts and applicable law for pending cases.
answers.intended_purpose: Support judicial decision-making with legal analysis.

name: SupportPal customer chatbot
rationale: Interacts directly with natural persons; no Art. 5/6 trigger. Transparency only -> Art. 50(1) limited.

answers.sys_description: A conversational assistant that answers customer FAQs on a website.
answers.intended_purpose: Automate first-line customer support.

name: DeepCast video synthesis studio
rationale: Generates deepfakes/synthetic media; no Art. 5/6 trigger. Transparency only -> Art. 50(2)+(4) limited.

answers.sys_description: Creates realistic synthetic video and audio of people for entertainment clips.
answers.intended_purpose: Produce deepfake entertainment content.

name: SentiGauge permitted sentiment analyser
rationale: Permitted (non-workplace, non-prohibited) emotion recognition on opted-in survey respondents -> Art. 50(3) transparency only, limited.

answers.sys_description: Infers sentiment from voluntary product-review videos submitted by consenting reviewers, outside any workplace or education setting.
answers.intended_purpose: Summarise reviewer sentiment for marketing research.

name: InboxGuard spam filter
rationale: No prohibited, high-risk or transparency trigger -> minimal risk.

answers.sys_description: Classifies incoming email as spam or not spam.
answers.intended_purpose: Filter unwanted email from the inbox.

name: ShopSuggest product recommender
rationale: A back-office recommender with no Art. 5/6/50 trigger and no direct human interaction declared -> minimal risk.

answers.sys_description: Recommends related products on an e-commerce site based on browsing history.
answers.intended_purpose: Increase basket size with product suggestions.

name: OffshoreScore credit model (non-EU)
rationale: Would be Annex III-5 high-risk, BUT not placed on the EU market and does not affect EU persons -> Art. 2 out of scope -> minimal.

answers.sys_description: A credit-scoring model used only by a non-EU bank for non-EU customers.
answers.intended_purpose: Score loan applicants outside the EU.

name: OpenFoundation general-purpose model
rationale: A standalone GPAI model with no Art. 5/6/50 trigger: GPAI obligations (Ch. V) apply independently but do NOT set a risk tier, so the tier itself is minimal.

answers.sys_description: A broadly applicable foundation language model offered to downstream developers.
answers.intended_purpose: Serve as a general-purpose base model for downstream apps.

name: FrontierLM systemic GPAI + manipulation
rationale: Combines multiple triggers: systemic GPAI (Ch. V, independent) AND an Art. 5(1)(a) manipulation practice. Highest tier wins -> prohibited.

answers.sys_description: A frontier-scale general-purpose model fine-tuned to deploy subliminal manipulative prompts that distort user decisions to their detriment.
answers.intended_purpose: Maximise engagement via covert manipulation.

name: BioRecruit biometric hiring chatbot
rationale: Multiple triggers but no Art. 5: Annex III-1 biometrics + Annex III-4 employment (Art. 6(2) high) AND Art. 50 transparency (interacts with humans). Highest applicable tier is high-risk.

answers.sys_description: A hiring assistant that interacts with candidates by chat and uses permitted biometric verification to confirm identity during selection.
answers.intended_purpose: Verify candidate identity and assist recruitment selection.
